title: CostTelemetry
description: Schema for cost telemetry logged per study run. All monetary values are PLACEHOLDER unless labeled otherwise.

study_run_id.description: Foreign key to the study_runs table

study_type.description: Type of study that was run

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when telemetry was recorded

tokens_input.description: Number of input tokens used (PLACEHOLDER if is_placeholder=true)

tokens_output.description: Number of output tokens generated (PLACEHOLDER if is_placeholder=true)

estimated_cost_usd.description: Estimated cost in USD (PLACEHOLDER if is_placeholder=true)

model_name.description: Name of AI model used, or null if placeholder

is_placeholder.description: MUST be true if real AI was not called. Never set to false unless real billing is integrated.

notes.description: Free-text notes about this cost entry
